---
title: "Example Quarto manuscript"
format: html
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Introduction

Reliable academic writing workflows should catch citation-key mistakes before a
paper is submitted [@smith2024].

Quarto uses Pandoc citation syntax, including grouped citations such as
[@lee2023; @garcia2022].

# Notes

This example is intentionally small. It is meant to show that `.qmd` files can
be checked as plain text with the same command used for Markdown manuscripts.
